speaker: speaker1
text: Hey , May , look , Is that the the poster of the movie we saw yesterday ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , that's right . That's the poster of the The Witch .

speaker: speaker1
text: May , I really regret watching it with you last night .

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course not . I just thought the movie was ... boring .

speaker: speaker2
text: Boring ? Come on , you clutched to my arm all the time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , I admit . The ghosts were scary .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's Gucci's influence . I love science fiction movies !

speaker: speaker2
text: Of course you do . They are silly stories just for little kids like you .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't call me kid . I am a grownup .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you dare watch scary movies with me tonight ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course ! I can watch them without you !
